cover.era_chip: 朝鮮 前期 · 壬辰倭亂
cover.subtitle:
부산에서 명량까지,
조선이 둘로 나뉘었다.
cover.imagePrompt: Late 16th century Korean illustration. ONE Korean naval admiral (Yi Sun-sin) in dark navy military robe with red command sash and brimmed iron helmet, standing on the deck of a turtle ship (geobukseon) at sea. Curved spiked roof of the turtle ship visible behind, distant Japanese ships on horizon, choppy gray waves. Composition: solitary commanding figure, calm before battle. Color: deep navy + crimson sash + ink-black + sea gray + hanji beige sky. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 부산 함락·탄금대 패전. 신립 자결, 한양 함락.
한산도 대첩. 이순신이 일본 수군 격파.
평양성 수복. 조명 연합군 반격 시작.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 임진왜란(1592)과 정유재란(1597) 구분, 한산도(임란)·명량(정유) 해전이 자주 출제된다. 훈련도감의 삼수병(포·사·살수) 구성과 속오군의 신분 망라도 빈출 포인트.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized turtle-ship (geobukseon) silhouette from side view with spiked back, simple ink-line. RIGHT: a small wave silhouette suggesting naval battle. Cream #F2EDE3 base + navy #1E3A8A accent + crimson #B91C1C detail. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
